subcodes.first_line: O My Name! Upon thee be My Glory! Affairs are known and what hath transpired is manifest; yet thou must follow in the footsteps of the Wronged One [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اسمی علیک بهائی امور معلوم و ما ورد مشهود ولکن آنجناب باید بر قدم مظلوم
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @wisdom [hikmat], @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance, @contention and conflict, @defending the Faith; protecting the Cause; apologetics
